deep_dive.title: GPU-Accelerated Effective Resistance Analysis for 3D IC Power Delivery Network
deep_dive.abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) integration is a critical technique for enhancing transistor density, improving power efficiency, and reducing interconnect delays. However, as current demands and design complexity increase, power deliver networks (PDNs) are facing growing challenges.Careful planning of through-silicon vias (TSVs) is essential for ensuring reliable PDNs, where effective resistance serves as a vital metric for the reliability. Ill-planned TSVs often cause 3D IC with unevenly distributed effective resistance and consequently severer IR Drop.In this paper, we propose a GPU-accelerated framework on accurate effective resistance analysis for early stage 3D IC PDNs. The proposed framework achieves a speedup of 5 to 6 orders of magnitude compared to the conventional direct solver, while maintaining negligible deviations in both maximum and average relative errors.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: GPU-accelerated effective resistance analysis for 3D IC power delivery network
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 针对3D IC电源分配网络的GPU加速有效电阻分析
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 针对3D IC电源分配网络的GPU加速有效电阻分析
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 针对3D IC电源分配网络的GPU加速有效电阻分析
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a GPU-accelerated framework for accurate effective resistance analysis in early-stage 3D IC PDNs, achieving 5-6 orders of magnitude speedup while maintaining sign-off accuracy.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对三维集成电路早期设计阶段电源分配网络（PDN）的有效电阻分析需求，现有方法速度慢且精度不足。本文提出一种GPU加速框架，利用GPU并行计算实现精确有效电阻分析，速度提升5-6个数量级，同时保持流片签核所需的精度。该方法通过高效的并行策略解决了大规模PDN分析的计算瓶颈，为3D IC PDN优化提供了快速评估手段。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对三维集成电路早期设计阶段电源分配网络（PDN）的有效电阻分析需求，现有方法速度慢且精度不足。本文提出一种GPU加速框架，利用GPU并行计算实现精确有效电阻分析，速度提升5-6个数量级，同时保持流片签核所需的精度。该方法通过高效的并行策略解决了大规模PDN分析的计算瓶颈，为3D IC PDN优化提供了快速评估手段。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Power integrity and PDN modeling optimization

deep_dive.title: FlexRC: A Flexible Multi-Point Model Order Reduction Method for Many-Port RC Networks
deep_dive.abstract: Efficient model order reduction for many-port resistor-capacitor (RC) networks is essential in post-layout circuit simulation. Existing high-accuracy elimination-based methods have certain limitations, such as fixed frequency points, large reduced-order models, or high reduction cost. This paper proposes FlexRC, a flexible multi-point model order reduction method for many-port RC networks. FlexRC starts from the same elimination step as previous methods, and then constructs a nonorthogonal projection basis by a modified block rational Arnoldi process to generate a sparse banded reduced model. FlexRC features three adjustable components: user-specified frequency points, a tolerance-controlled port-reduction technique for the internal subsystem, and an optional sparsity-control strategy. We discuss passivity under port-reduction perturbations, analyze moment matching, and provide a conservative error estimate for port reduction. Numerical experiments on industrial RC examples and IBM power-grid examples demonstrate the effectiveness of FlexRC in terms of reduction time and transient simulation time.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Flexible multi-point model order reduction for many-port RC networks, enabling efficient post-layout SI/PI simulation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向多端口RC网络的灵活多点模型降阶，支持高效后布局SI/PI仿真。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向多端口RC网络的灵活多点模型降阶，支持高效后布局SI/PI仿真。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向多端口RC网络的灵活多点模型降阶，支持高效后布局SI/PI仿真。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes FlexRC, a flexible multi-point model order reduction method for many-port RC networks, using block rational Arnoldi process with adjustable frequency points and port reduction, reducing model size while preserving accuracy for post-layout simulation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对后布局仿真中多端口RC网络的模型降阶需求，现有消除法存在频率点固定、降阶模型偏大等问题。本文提出FlexRC方法，基于改进的块有理Arnoldi过程构造非正交投影基，生成稀疏带状降阶模型。用户可灵活指定频率点，并采用容差控制的端口压缩技术进一步减小规模。该方法在保持精度的前提下显著减小模型尺寸，适用于高速互连和PDN的快速仿真。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对后布局仿真中多端口RC网络的模型降阶需求，现有消除法存在频率点固定、降阶模型偏大等问题。本文提出FlexRC方法，基于改进的块有理Arnoldi过程构造非正交投影基，生成稀疏带状降阶模型。用户可灵活指定频率点，并采用容差控制的端口压缩技术进一步减小规模。该方法在保持精度的前提下显著减小模型尺寸，适用于高速互连和PDN的快速仿真。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Advanced modeling and optimization techniques for SI/PI in high speed systems
